title: No more keybinds
description: One menu instead of thousands keybindings
body:
**No more keybinds** is a unique solution for managing numerous keybinds in Minecraft, especially useful for large modpacks. This mod allows users to open and interact with a convenient menu of all available keybinds without needing to assign separate keys.

#### Main Features:
- **Keybind Menu**: Press `Alt` to open an automatically generated menu with all available keybinds in the game.
- **Menu Control**: Hold the middle mouse button to move the menu to a convenient spot on your screen.
- **Interactive Control**: You can trigger keybinds directly through the menu, even if no specific key is assigned to them, simplifying interaction with a large number of keybinds.
- **Mod Support**: The entire interface can display keybinds from other mods. This mod is specifically designed for modpacks with many mods where the number of keybinds can grow quickly.

#### Future Plans:
- **Interface Editor**: In future updates, users will be able to customize the appearance of the menu to suit their needs.
- **Full Keypress Emulation**: There will be an option to fully simulate keypresses through the menu, further expanding the mod's functionality.

#### What Makes This Mod Unique?
**Keybind Menu Mod** is the first and only solution that allows you to manage keybinds efficiently through an intuitive menu without manually assigning them to individual keyboard buttons. This makes it indispensable for modpacks with many mods and keybinds.

The mod is in active development, and more customization and usability improvements will be added in the future.
